Signature Programs
The Philosophy
Image is not vanity — it is strategy. When you look the part, own the room, and communicate with confidence, everything changes. I help you take deliberate control of that narrative — in boardrooms, on stages, in interviews, and in every room that matters.
How It Works
Transform how you
show up — everywhere

Executive presence, personal branding, grooming, business etiquette, and communication skills — Regina's programmes are structured, practical, and built for real, lasting transformation.

Individual Consultation

One-on-one sessions covering colour analysis, body shape, wardrobe, grooming, and personal styling — designed to align your appearance with your professional goals and authentic self.

Corporate Image Training

Interactive group sessions for professionals and organisations covering executive presence, personal branding, business etiquette, and workplace communication — delivered in-person or virtually.

Soft Skills & Workshops

Structured workshops on executive presence, professional conduct, and communication skills — certified by the Indian Leadership Academy and tailored to your team's specific needs.

Student & Life Skills

Confidence, empathy, grooming, and self-awareness sessions for students, fresh graduates, and individuals stepping into corporate life for the first time.
